TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kus kus ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 631 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 606 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kus kus hya' ga Sinevaudjan. tay mkyahu' na Kus kus hya' ga Draki. tay 'zil na Kus kus hya' ga Anteng. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kus~ɕ kus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βotan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kus~ɕ kus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕine*au*jan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kus~ɕ kus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa *raki. taj ʔzil na kus~ɕ kus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa anteŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kus kus ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 631 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 606 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kus kus hya' ga Sinevaudjan. tay mkyahu' na Kus kus hya' ga Draki. tay 'zil na Kus kus hya' ga Anteng. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kus~ɕ kus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βotan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kus~ɕ kus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕine*au*jan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kus~ɕ kus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa *raki. taj ʔzil na kus~ɕ kus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa anteŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
